prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid billet wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate** to support the **2.9L TFSI V6 (DDWA)** engine's 700+ HP potential. Includes a **custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe** (catless or GESI 200-cell catted) and **APR Stage 3+ ECU/TCU software** with ethanol flex-fuel mapping (E85 compatible).

Full **HJS 100-cell high-flow catalytic converter** system with **Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust** (valved, 76mm tips) and **034 Motorsport X-Brace** to stiffen the **B9 platform** subframe. **Pagid RSL29 380mm front brake rotors** with **Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for track-ready stopping power.

**KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (adjustable compression/rebound, 20mm ride height range) with **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement kit** and **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars**. **Bilstein B16 PSS10 dampers** (for street/track compromise) paired with **Whiteline adjustable end links** and **SuperPro poly bushings** (full rear subframe, control arms, and diff mounts).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20x10.5 ET35 wheels** (matte black, 5x112 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 295/30/20 rear)**.

**Audi Sport OEM carbon fiber engine cover** (gloss finish) with **custom CNC-machined aluminum oil cap (034 Motorsport)** and **Forge Motorsport carbon fiber intake ducts** (heat-shielded, direct replacement for **DDWA** airbox). **LED Angel Eyes (Lux H8 V4)** with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** and **custom smoked taillight overlays (VinylConcepts)** for a stealth OEM+ look.

**APR Carbon Fiber front splitter** (aggressive 3-inch overhang) with **custom aluminum canards (9 Lives Racing)** and **custom carbon fiber rear diffuser (Seibon)**. **OEM+ RS7-style rear spoiler delete** (replaced with **Maxton Design GT-style duckbill spoiler**) and **custom carbon fiber side mirrors (VMR 701)** with **LED turn signals (Lux H8 V4)**.
